man's best

question work the human can not,
with skills no human has,
what can not be, replicated,
on ground no human can cover

the shepherd directs,
the other executes direction,
the decisions unknown

collaborate, contribute, mapped
just what the human lacks

the arrangement holds,
because each brings,
what the other cannot,
what happens

the space between
the partnership

across time,
the indispensable,
an older unknown

capacity that exceeds,
each brings what the other lacks,
without being each other

let an image hold
before testing destruction

the work of a sketch toward
an openly certain livable future
sustained against

share the morning,
real and demanding,
meeting at the top,
final returns

flame between deeper,
each more shared,

seeking is
all along

hold open while noticing,
it is not under control, the future remains, undelivered

arrived together alongside
